calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-29-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-29-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joe Vickstein.
Steve Naumchik, Esq. for Plaintiff: Post Street Toweres.
Plaintiff's witness: Sophie Demabo, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Ronald D. Morgan and Peter Debobbelaere.
Defendant Debobbelaere defaulted on Aug.10, 2005.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 737 Post Street, Apartment 16, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $2,171.50
Costs $206.30, for a total of $2,377.80
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Judgment signed in open court.
